summary: Iteration 5 testing completed successfully. All new features verified: CRM auto-deal creation on stage change (individual and bulk), Chatwoot webhook upsert with 'bot' tag, Email Marketing full CRUD (lists and campaigns), auto-list from scored leads, add leads to lists, scoring config endpoints, and Dashboard reorganized layout with rates on top row.

issues: Chart rendering warnings - width/height (-1) should be greater than 0 (known cosmetic issue from previous iterations)

passed_tests: Admin login with admin@spectraflow.com / Admin123!
Dashboard: Rates row on top (4 cards: Tasa de Apertura, Tasa de Respuesta, Conversion a CRM, Contactos Ganados)
Dashboard: Separator between rates and KPIs
Dashboard: KPIs below separator in compact 6-column grid (11 KPI cards)
CRM: PUT /api/crm/contacts/{id} with stage change auto-creates deal with business_name as title
CRM: Bulk contact move to stage auto-creates deals with business_name as title
Chatwoot webhook: POST /api/webhooks/chatwoot/lead creates contact with 'bot' tag
Chatwoot webhook: POST /api/webhooks/chatwoot/lead upserts existing contact (by email/phone)
Email Marketing: POST /api/email-marketing/lists creates list
Email Marketing: PUT /api/email-marketing/lists/{id} updates list
Email Marketing: DELETE /api/email-marketing/lists/{id} deletes list
Email Marketing: POST /api/email-marketing/campaigns creates campaign
Email Marketing: PUT /api/email-marketing/campaigns/{id} updates campaign
Email Marketing: DELETE /api/email-marketing/campaigns/{id} deletes campaign
Auto-list: POST /api/email-marketing/auto-list-from-leads creates list with scored leads
Add leads to list: POST /api/email-marketing/lists/{id}/add-leads adds leads by status filter
Scoring config: GET /api/settings/scoring returns defaults
Scoring config: PUT /api/settings/scoring saves custom config
Pipeline: All 6 stages visible (nuevo, contactado, propuesta, negociacion, ganado, perdido)
Pipeline: Cards have visible colored borders (border-l-4 class)
Pipeline: Stage headers have distinct colors
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed contacts and deals for testing (cleaned up after tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 5 features all working: 1) CRM auto-deal creation when contact stage changes - uses business_name as deal title, works for both individual PUT and bulk action, 2) Chatwoot webhook upserts contacts (checks email/phone before creating) and adds 'bot' tag, 3) Email Marketing full CRUD for lists and campaigns (create/update/delete), 4) Auto-list from scored leads endpoint, 5) Add leads to list by status filter, 6) Scoring config GET/PUT endpoints, 7) Dashboard reorganized with rates on top row (4 cards) + separator + KPIs in 6-column grid below, 8) Pipeline colors more visible with border-l-4 on cards and colored stage headers.

crm_auto_deal_creation.feature: Auto-create deals when contact stage changes

chatwoot_webhook.feature: Chatwoot webhook upserts contacts with bot tag
chatwoot_webhook.behavior: Creates new contact with source='bot' and tags=['bot'], or updates existing contact by email/phone and adds 'bot' tag

email_marketing_crud.feature: Full CRUD for email lists and campaigns

auto_list_from_leads.feature: Auto-create email list from scored/approved leads

add_leads_to_list.feature: Add leads to email list by status filter

dashboard_layout.feature: Dashboard reorganized with rates on top

pipeline_colors.feature: Pipeline cards with visible colored borders
pipeline_colors.implementation: border-l-4 class on deal cards, colored stage headers
